items.name_en: Premium Grade, High Version
items.name_cn:
Premium Grade, High Version
【Gold Check❤ Medium Size】
Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag
Inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a flagship product reflecting Dior aesthetics. Perfect for storing daily essentials, it features a new interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a more stylish look. The front is adorned with the "Christian Dior" logo, fully embodying Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style No.: 1286
Size: 36×28 cm

items.name_en: Genuine Grade
items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade
New Golden Check Basket Bag
This basket-style handbag is eye-catching and stylish, blending practical functionality with an elegant silhouette. Adorned with fluorescent pink animal print embroidery throughout, the front is accented with a Christian Dior Paris logo to elevate the style. Spacious interior with a detachable matching zip pouch, and a detachable, adjustable embroidered shoulder strap for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Front accented with Christian Dior Paris logo
Detachable zip pouch with Christian Dior Paris logo
Detachable, adjustable embroidered shoulder strap
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy
Dimensions: 35 x 20.5 x 11 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, sunglasses, and 1 card holder

items.name_en: New Dior ❤️❤️
items.name_cn:
New Dior ❤️❤️
This Lady Dior handbag is exquisitely designed with a spacious interior. Crafted from white lambskin, it features a woven grid quilting and a "D.I.O.R." charm, showcasing a fashionable and classic charm. The multi-compartment design is practical for various daily items. The chain is embellished with beads, making it easy to carry on the shoulder or crossbody.
Front "D.I.O.R." charm
Flip-top closure
1 exterior compartment
1 interior compartment
1 zip pocket
1 slip pocket
6 card slots
Chain embellished with beads
Made in Italy
Style: 3105
19.5 x 12.5 x 5 cm

items.name_en: New Dior Tote with Linen Embroidery
items.name_cn:
New Dior Tote with Linen Embroidery
Crafted from jute canvas, this Book Tote measures 36.5*28cm. Designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this mainstay piece embodies Dior aesthetics. The medium size features a "CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS" logo on the front, showcasing Dior's signature craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand or on the shoulder.
Front features "CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS" logo
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy
Style: 8001

Designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a mainstay piece embodying Dior aesthetics. Crafted from white fabric and adorned with a multicolor Rêve d'Infini pattern embroidery by artist Pietro Ruffo, it offers a dreamy new interpretation of the star symbol beloved by Christian Dior, fitting various daily items. The large size features a CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS logo on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand or on the shoulder.
Style: 8001
42 x 35 x 18.5 cm

items.name_en: ❤️ This 30 Montaigne East-West bag is crafted from white smooth calfskin, elevating the style of the collection with a classic and elegant design. The flap features a vintage gold-finish metal CD buckle, inspired by the closure of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. Other details include a debossed 30 MONTAIGNE logo on the back, highlighting the clean design. The small size comes with a detachable chain shoulder strap with leather trim, allowing for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
